title: premna micrantha
intro: Premna micrantha is a shrub species, commonly known as the small-leaf Indian balm, which is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Premna micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Premna micrantha is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
